request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies in NATO are actually benefiting more from our security commitments than we are? While we're spending billions to protect shared borders, some members are barely meeting their 2% GDP defense spending targets. It's time we focus on securing our own interests first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
